abilities.description: Spend all of your mana and gain that many random buffs.Upgraded: Spend all of your mana and give that many random buffs to yourself or another unit.

translation.ru_description: Потратьте всю ману. Получите столько же случайных баффов.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Потратьте всю ману. Раздайте столько же случайных баффов себе или другому.
translation.en_description: Spend all of your mana and gain that many random buffs.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spend all of your mana and give that many random buffs to yourself or another unit.

abilities.description: Deals a random amount of damage. Requires line of sightUpgraded: Deals a random amount of damage and inflicts random debuffs. Requires line of sight

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наносит случайный урон и вешает случайные дебаффы. Нужна видимость.
translation.en_description: Deals a random amount of damage. Requires line of sight
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deals a random amount of damage and inflicts random debuffs. Requires line of sight

abilities.description: Cast any random spell. The spell is usually good.Upgraded: Cast any random upgraded spell. The spell is usually good.

translation.ru_description: Применяет случайное заклинание. Оно обычно хорошее.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Применяет случайное УЛУЧШЕННОЕ заклинание. Оно обычно хорошее.
translation.en_description: Cast any random spell. The spell is usually good.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Cast any random upgraded spell. The spell is usually good.
